evals.name: card-grid-misalignment
evals.expected_output: Should diagnose the flexbox issue, recommend using gap property and CSS Grid for equal heights, provide responsive solution

evals.name: navbar-spacing-issues
evals.prompt:
My navbar links have weird spacing - the gap between them is not consistent and on mobile they overflow. I'm using Tailwind. Here's the code:
Home About Contact Blog
How do I fix the spacing and make it mobile responsive?
evals.expected_output: Should identify missing gap/spacing utilities in Tailwind, provide responsive classes, suggest mobile menu or wrapping solution

evals.name: centering-nightmare
evals.expected_output: Should explain why margin:auto doesn't vertically center, provide flexbox or grid solution, ensure responsive behavior
